tips: Repair your weapons at the Blacksmith to maintain damage output.
Visit the Bar for rumors — they often lead to hidden quests.
Scrap unwanted items at the Workbench for crafting materials.
Settlement shops restock their inventory every few days.
Riftspire dungeons scale to your party level — prepare accordingly.
Different biomes have different resource nodes — explore widely.
Your reputation with a faction unlocks unique shop inventory.
Craft ammo before heading into the wastes — it's scarce out there.
Talk to NPCs in settlements — some offer unique side missions.
The Crafting Table lets you combine materials into gear upgrades.
Rest at a safehouse to recover HP and clear status effects.
Higher-level zones have better loot drops but tougher enemies.
Check your Quest Tracker (Tab) to review active missions.
Party NPCs gain experience alongside you — keep them equipped.
The World Map shows rift activity — red means danger.
Biome-specific ambient audio hints at nearby resource types.
Some doors require specific keycards found in dungeons.
Saving frequently is recommended — the wastes are unforgiving.
